hero.subtitle: Web apps, mobile apps, and n8n / Zapier automations — engineered by a small team that thinks in architectures, not slide decks.

services.title: What we ship
services.subtitle: Three pillars, fully typed, production-ready from day one.

web.title: Web Development
web.description: Next.js, Angular, Astro, React. Server Components, streaming, edge rendering. TypeScript strict, accessible by default.

mobile.title: Mobile Development
mobile.description: Flutter, React Native, Ionic. Native iOS + Android performance, offline-first data, clean architecture.

automation.title: Automations
automation.description: n8n and Zapier pipelines that hold. Custom MCP servers, CI/CD, AI-assisted workflows.

team.title: The people behind the code
team.subtitle: Three engineers, not an agency org chart. You talk to the people who write the code.

bios.alejandro: Founder. REST APIs at scale, MCP servers, AI-assisted dev workflows.
bios.valeria: Full-stack engineer. React, Angular, Node — end-to-end features that hold.
bios.mateo: Mobile engineer. Flutter + React Native craftsman. Pixel-perfect UI, native performance.

projects.title: Recent projects
projects.subtitle: A slice of what we've shipped — full systems, from API to UI.

delivery.title: On-demand delivery platform
delivery.summary: Cross-platform delivery app with real-time dispatch, live tracking, and driver settlement. Backend handles 10K+ daily orders.

backoffice.title: Enterprise ERP · 120+ modules
backoffice.summary: Back-office suite covering finance, HR, logistics, and compliance. Role-based access across 30+ user types.

pos.title: Restaurant POS system
pos.summary: Hybrid POS for a national restaurant chain. Offline-first order capture, split bills, kitchen display sync.

fintech.title: Fintech analytics dashboard
fintech.summary: B2B dashboard with real-time transaction streams, anomaly alerts, and configurable KPIs. Sub-100ms query latency.

realestate.title: Real-estate landing + blog
realestate.summary: Static-first marketing site with CMS-driven listings, MDX blog, and image optimization. 100/100 Lighthouse.

aiagent.title: AI support agent
aiagent.summary: Customer support agent with a custom MCP server exposing internal tools. Handles tier-1 tickets autonomously.

automation.title: n8n automation stack
automation.summary: 20+ workflows orchestrating lead capture, AI summarization, CRM sync, and invoice generation.

fitness.title: Fitness & health app
fitness.summary: Cross-platform fitness tracker with workout plans, wearable sync, and subscription billing.
